<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/deploy-quickstart-to-devnet.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-deploy-quickstart-to-devnet-bash-866" location="lines:866-872" -->
```bash
   curl -s -X POST http://keycloak.localhost:8082/realms/AppUser/protocol/openid-connect/token \
    -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
    -d "grant_type=password" \
    -d "client_id=app-user-unsafe" \
    -d "username=app-user" \
    -d "password=app-user" | jq .access_token

```
